g.text: 63.01s59.33s74.81s199.01s141.26s133.48sQuery: She sits back down andthe other woman then pierces her tongue.
55.43s48.29s74.24s190.48s96.17s88.20sQuery: Ashe dances, the man jumps on top of a rope andstarts teetering back and forth untilhe slides down into a split.
6.10s1.10s1.11s100.18s84.17s61.12sQuery: The family made up of a lady a man,a young girl, a baby anda dog decorate the Christmas tree whilefilmed in fast motion.
